messages.content: 扩展到30字：Development of heavy ion cluster-based ion trail finding algorithms.
发展了基于重离子团簇的离子轨迹查找算法，提高精确度与效率。
英语
Development of advanced algorithms for finding ion trails using heavy ion clusters, enhancing precision and efficiency.
润色：Development of a heavy ion cluster-based ion trail finding algorithm.
Development and refinement of an algorithm for detecting ion trails using heavy ion clusters.
tracking
Enhancement and creation of an algorithm for tracking ion trails through the use of heavy ion clusters.
不要用trail
Advancement in developing an algorithm for tracking ion paths utilizing heavy ion clusters.
重写
Development of a sophisticated algorithm designed for the precise mapping of ion trajectories using clusters of heavy ions.
track
Creation of a state-of-the-art algorithm aimed at accurately tracking ion movements with the employment of heavy ion clusters.
润色：Development of heavy ion tracking algorithms using heavy ion clusters based on deep learning methods to accelerate the realisation of data processing and tracking rates.
Refinement of sophisticated algorithms for tracking heavy ions, employing clusters of heavy ions combined with deep learning techniques to significantly enhance data processing and tracking speeds.
目的是条数据处理速度
Development of advanced heavy ion tracking algorithms, utilizing clusters and deep learning approaches, is aimed at markedly improving data processing speeds.

润色：In this work, significant progress has been made in the design of the HiBT system, and the cluster model of Topmetal-M has been realised using Geant4 and is in high agreement with the experimental data, based on which a deep learning based ion trail finding is algorithm has been realised, and the algorithm is currently being iterated.

In this study, substantial advancements have been achieved in the development of the HiBT system. The cluster model of Topmetal-M was successfully implemented using Geant4, showing a high degree of correlation with experimental data. Building on this foundation, an ion trail finding algorithm driven by deep learning has been developed and is currently undergoing iterations for enhancement.
The hardware and software design of the system was completed and the positional resolution of the system was characterised using in-beam testing.

The system's hardware and software architecture was meticulously designed and finalized, followed by an in-depth characterization of its positional resolution through rigorous in-beam testing procedures.
The next step will be to complete the hardware and software design of the system and characterise the positional resolution of the system using in-beam testing.
The forthcoming step involves finalizing the hardware and software design of the system, followed by a thorough characterization of its positional resolution through targeted in-beam testing.
精简：The forthcoming step involves finalizing the hardware and software design of the system, followed by the characterization of its positional resolution through targeted beam testing.
The next step includes completing the system's hardware and software design and determining its positional resolution via targeted beam testing.
